changes: the new user and the referral owner each receive the configured reward on the linked financial account
Firebase provisional-null referral transactions use a verified root fallback instead of failing silently
a partial legacy referredBy state with no reward record is repaired safely once
the same user and code retry is idempotent and cannot pay either party twice
both signed-in accounts refresh their displayed balance immediately through an auth-UID marker
default unsaved referral rewards are 1 USD bonus for each party while explicit admin values remain respected
